name: 推断与隐含义
subject: english
domain_name: 阅读与文本分析 / Reading & Textual Analysis / Reading
curriculum_points: Students will be able to: • make inferences and draw conclusions from information, ideas and values in texts • interpret and analyse information, ideas and/or opinions in texts • identify and explain the author’s purpose and point of view • identify and explain the use of language to create tone or atmosphere • identify and explain the use of language to influence the reader
